headline: Apple’s failed self-driving car program left a legacy of powerful AI chips
summary: Apple's car project failed but its AI chip development succeeded. The car team realized the need for powerful on-device AI processing. This focus led to the advanced AI capabilities in Apple's current chips.

headline: SteelSeries’ best gaming headset over $100 off
summary: SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro Wireless headset is on sale. Get over $100 off, priced at $239.99. Xbox and PlayStation versions available, compatible with multiple platforms.

headline: How Philips Hue Got the Smart Home Right
summary: The article explores Philips Hue's success in the smart home market. It highlights Hue's intuitive control and adaptability. Philips Hue makes smart home integration easy and invisible.

headline: Oura Ring 5 Review: Less Is More
summary: The Oura Ring 5 is reviewed as a top smart ring and casual health tracker. It's an excellent smartwatch alternative for newcomers. Existing Oura users considering an upgrade will find it worthwhile.

headline: Avengers: Doomsday Concept Art Reveals 20+ Returning Heroes
summary: New concept art for "Avengers: Doomsday" has been released. It reveals over 20 returning Marvel heroes. First look at Cyclops, Mister Fantastic, and Doctor Doom included.

headline: TennoCon 2026: Warframe & Soulframe Announcements
summary: All announcements from TennoCon 2026 are detailed. News and trailers for Warframe were showcased. Updates on Soulframe were also revealed at the fan event.

headline: Today's Best Deals: LEGO, Games, 4K Blu-rays
summary: The article lists today's top deals. Highlights include LEGO Technic McLaren P1 and Trails in the Sky 1st Chapter. Discounts on 4K Blu-rays and more are featured.

headline: Ryse: Son of Rome Almost Became Xbox’s Assassin’s Creed
summary: Ryse: Son of Rome initially planned multiple historical eras. Ambitions aimed for an "Assassin's Creed"-like franchise. Plans were abandoned due to the game's commercial and critical failure.

headline: Widdecombe Killing: No Political Motive Suspected After New Arrest
summary: Police report no political motive found in the Widdecombe killing. A 28-year-old man was arrested in Rotherham, South Yorkshire. Authorities are not seeking further suspects in the case.

headline: British Couple Rescued from Spain Wildfires with Severe Burns
summary: A British couple was rescued from a ravine during Spain's wildfires. They were found semi-conscious with 40% burns. The incident occurred amid blazes in Almeria province.

headline: UK Healthy Life Expectancy Falls: Is NHS to Blame?
summary: The UK is experiencing a decline in healthy life expectancy. The article investigates potential causes for this trend. It questions the role of the NHS in this public health issue.

headline: Tuchel Slams 'Lucky' England, Bellingham Defends Team
summary: England boss Thomas Tuchel called his team "lucky" after a World Cup win. Jude Bellingham disagreed, defending the players' performance. The remarks followed England's quarter-final victory over Norway.
